appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/sse.md with /events/poll endpoint semantics, polling connection state, fallback behavior, and Vercel timeout gotcha.
Updated .factory/library/environment.md with TS6059 rootDir note for api/tsconfig.json and guidance to use root typecheck command.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify validator minimums for config/parity-only implementation tasks versus mandatory full test runs, or enforce current requirement consistently in handoff review.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: vercel-api-routes-sync transcript/handoff ran typecheck+lint only while skill feedback reported followedProcedure=true despite SKILL.md requiring test+typecheck+lint.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify when agent-browser verification is mandatory for UI state-only changes validated by automated tests and when it can be skipped with explicit rationale.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: vercel-sse-polling-fallback changed ConnectionStatusIndicator UI state but transcript had no agent-browser usage while handoff still marked followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refine the 'all protected routes use auth middleware' convention to explicitly carve out SSE/EventSource-compatible token handling routes that use controller-level auth extraction.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: sseRoutes intentionally avoid standard auth middleware to support EventSource, including /api/orgs/:orgId/events and /events/poll.
